given: all inventory codes conform to location-batch-serial format (three segments separated by '-')
when: the validation query executes on the migrated stock table
then: it returns a count of 0 unparseable codes
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on data-store state, the probe returns 0 when every code conformed and split cleanly, asserted by querying the migrated rows on the paired branch. Owner: the validation/probe statement in the repository/migration layer (app/repositories). Cross-cutting concern: data integrity (R1), the probe is the review signal that no conforming row was dropped or mis-parsed.

independence.rationale: AC1 tests that the validation mechanism exists; AC2 verifies it returns 0 when all codes are valid
